payload.evidence: Implemented cycle-safe CLI dependency add/remove/query commands, replayable story.dependency.add/remove operations, downstream E09 story and DAG registration, isolated-worktree rebuild fallback, and typed CLI/repository/replay tests. Validation passed: story verify US-073; live Symphony board derivation; cargo fmt --check; cargo test --workspace (137 tests); cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; git diff --check; bash -n scripts/validate-changeset-rebuild.sh.

payload.actions_taken: ["read run contract and Harness sources","reviewed and completed CLI dependency implementation","added typed add remove and query parsing coverage","registered US-074 through US-080 and nine dependency edges through the run-scoped CLI","proved no-op and cycle writes leave the changeset unchanged","fixed isolated-worktree rebuild CLI discovery","ran focused rebuild board workspace and lint validation","updated US-073 durable proof"]
payload.decisions_made: ["used blocker-to-blocked edge semantics with deterministic queries","rejected self edges missing stories and cycles before mutation","kept duplicate add and missing remove as unchanged no-op writes","registered the approved E09 graph only after replay-safe mutation existed","used the locally built CLI as isolated-worktree rebuild fallback without changing installed CLI preference"]
payload.errors: ["Initial live story verification failed because scripts/validate-changeset-rebuild.sh hardcoded the absent worktree scripts/bin/harness-cli; added a built-binary fallback and reran successfully."]
payload.harness_friction: Isolated Symphony worktrees omit scripts/bin/harness-cli, while rebuild validation previously required it; US-073 now resolves this directly by falling back to target/debug/harness-cli after an explicit override and installed binary check.
payload.notes: The current v1 trace operation intentionally omits cross-changeset intake_id 177 because numeric intake ids are not replay-stable; the live run DB retains detailed linked trace #209, and US-074 owns stable cross-changeset identity. Duration and token estimate are unavailable because no reliable counters were captured.
payload.task_summary: Completed US-073 replay-safe story dependency mutation and E09 DAG registration
